people.name: Sofia
people.text: I love spending time outdoors. At the weekend I usually go cycling with my dad. I am also in the school swimming team and we train three times a week. I do not play team sports because I prefer individual activities where I can focus on my own performance.

people.text: Sport is important to me but I like being part of a group. I play basketball for my school and we have matches every Saturday. I also enjoy watching live football games with my friends. I am not very good at water sports but I would like to try them one day.

I find it difficult but very interesting. I read at least 30 minutes every night before I go to sleep.

people.text: I am very interested in space and science. I read books and watch documentaries about planets and the universe. I have a telescope that I use on clear nights. I want to become an astronaut or a scientist. I also go to a science club at school every Thursday.

people.text: I have two dogs and a cat at home and I love taking care of them. I take the dogs for a walk every morning and evening. I also help at a pet shelter near my school on Fridays. I am interested in animal health and I read about it online. I would like to work as a vet nurse one day.

people.text: I have a parrot called Pedro. He can say about twenty words and he always makes me laugh. I have had him since I was six years old. I spend a lot of time teaching him new phrases. My friends love visiting my house to see him. I want to learn more about tropical birds.

My biggest problem is understanding fast speech.

I keep a notebook where I write new words every day. I want to pass an international English exam this year.

We have already collected twelve bags of rubbish from the park near the school. I want our school to use less paper and I am writing a proposal for the head teacher.

people.name: Yara

My biggest challenge is food because I love meat and I know it is not good for the planet. I am trying to eat less meat but it is difficult.

I prefer having a small group of close friends to having many friends I do not know well. I find big groups quite stressful.

questions.prompt: Who became friends with people because of a shared interest?
questions.rationale: Lucie and her friends became friends because they all love the same kind of music.

questions.prompt: Who prefers a small number of close friends to a large social group?
questions.rationale: Lucie prefers having a small group of close friends.

questions.prompt: Who has received help from a school professional to improve social skills?
questions.rationale: Aaron's school counsellor has helped him practise talking to people.

questions.prompt: Who has friendships that exist only online?
questions.rationale: Aaron has good friends online but does not see them in person.

questions.prompt: Who goes to live music events with their friends?
questions.rationale: Lucie and her friends go to concerts together.

people.name: Selma
people.text: I love listening to music. My favourite style is jazz and I know a lot about its history. I have a large collection of CDs and vinyl records. I go to live jazz concerts whenever I can. I am also learning to play the trumpet because jazz trumpet players are my biggest inspiration.

people.name: Ryan
people.text: I am very into films. I watch at least two films a week, mostly science fiction and action. I write reviews on a film website and other users read and comment on them. I have a list of my top 100 films of all time. My dream is to become a film director.

people.name: Zara
people.text: I enjoy making short films with my phone. I edit them on my laptop and post them on a video platform. My videos are about everyday life in my city. I have about three hundred subscribers and some of my videos have been shared thousands of times. I hope to make documentary films professionally one day.

questions.prompt: Who is learning an instrument because of a musical hero?
questions.rationale: Selma is learning trumpet because jazz trumpet players are her biggest inspiration.

questions.prompt: Who has a large physical collection connected to their interest?
questions.rationale: Selma has a large collection of CDs and vinyl records.

questions.prompt: Who writes about a hobby topic for other people to read online?
questions.rationale: Ryan writes film reviews on a film website.

questions.prompt: Who wants to work in the film industry in the future?
questions.rationale: Ryan's dream is to become a film director.

questions.prompt: Who creates video content that has been seen by many people?
questions.rationale: Zara's videos have been shared thousands of times.

questions.prompt: Who makes films about the place where they live?
questions.rationale: Zara's videos are about everyday life in her city.

questions.prompt: Who attends live events connected to their musical interest?
questions.rationale: Selma goes to live jazz concerts whenever she can.

people.name: Bruno
people.text: I volunteer at a community centre near my home every Saturday. I help serve meals to elderly people who live alone. I started doing this after my school organised a volunteering day. I enjoy talking to the elderly visitors and listening to their stories. I feel it is important to help people in the local community.

people.name: Ingrid
people.text: I volunteer at the local library. I help sort and shelve books and I also help organise reading sessions for young children on Wednesday afternoons. I love books so it is the perfect place for me. The librarian says I am one of their most reliable volunteers. I have been doing this for almost two years.

people.name: Jerome
people.text: I started volunteering because I wanted to do something useful in my free time. I help at a food bank where people can collect free food. I pack bags and help carry boxes. It is hard physical work but I feel very satisfied at the end of the day. I go every other Sunday and I have already encouraged two of my friends to join.

questions.prompt: Who started volunteering because of their school?
questions.rationale: Bruno started volunteering after his school organised a volunteering day.

questions.prompt: Who volunteers at a place that serves food to people in need?
questions.rationale: Bruno helps serve meals to elderly people at the community centre.

questions.prompt: Who volunteers somewhere that connects directly to their personal interest?
questions.rationale: Ingrid loves books and volunteers at the local library.

questions.prompt: Who has been doing their volunteering role for nearly two years?
questions.rationale: Ingrid has been volunteering at the library for almost two years.

questions.prompt: Who has persuaded other people to start volunteering?
questions.rationale: Jerome has encouraged two of his friends to join the food bank.

questions.prompt: Who does volunteering work that is physically demanding?
questions.rationale: Jerome says packing bags and carrying boxes at the food bank is hard physical work.

questions.prompt: Who helps with activities for young children during their volunteering?
questions.rationale: Ingrid helps organise reading sessions for young children on Wednesday afternoons.

people.name: Nour
people.text: I love travelling. Last summer I went to Portugal with my school for a language trip. It was my first time on a plane and I was nervous, but it was amazing. I tried local food, visited historic sites and made friends with students from other countries. Now I want to travel to Asia next.

people.name: Stefan
people.text: I have travelled to many places with my parents because my dad works for an international company. I have lived in three different countries. I can speak two languages because of this. Moving a lot was sometimes hard because I had to make new friends, but I think it made me more confident.

people.name: Alicia
people.text: I have not travelled outside my country yet but I hope to do so soon. I save part of my pocket money each month for a future trip. I plan to visit Japan because I love Japanese culture, food and language. I am already studying Japanese in my free time to prepare for the trip.

questions.prompt: Who travelled abroad with their school?
questions.rationale: Nour went to Portugal with her school for a language trip.

questions.prompt: Who travelled by plane for the first time recently?
questions.rationale: Nour says it was her first time on a plane during the Portugal trip.

questions.prompt: Who has moved to different countries because of a parent's job?
questions.rationale: Stefan's dad works for an international company and the family has lived in three countries.

questions.prompt: Who learned a second language as a result of living abroad?
questions.rationale: Stefan can speak two languages because he has lived in different countries.

questions.prompt: Who is saving money to pay for a future trip?
questions.rationale: Alicia saves part of her pocket money each month for a future trip.

questions.prompt: Who is learning a language to prepare for travelling to a specific country?
questions.rationale: Alicia is studying Japanese to prepare for her planned trip to Japan.

questions.prompt: Who says that a travel experience made them more self-assured?
questions.rationale: Stefan says that moving a lot made him more confident.

people.name: Pippa
people.text: I take part in athletics at my school. I specialise in the 400 metres and I train every Tuesday and Thursday with my coach. Last month I ran my personal best time. I also do some strength training in the gym to help my running. My goal is to get selected for the regional athletics team this year.

people.name: Kofi
people.text: I play tennis. I have been playing since I was seven years old and I have a private lesson every Saturday. I have entered several local tournaments and I have reached the semi-final once. My biggest challenge is my serve, which my coach is helping me improve. I watch professional tennis matches on TV to learn from the best players.

people.name: Dana
people.text: I swim competitively. My team trains at 6 a.m. before school three days a week, which is very early, but I do not mind because I love swimming. I have won two medals at regional level. My parents drive me to the pool every training morning. I would like to swim at national level one day.

questions.prompt: Who has recently achieved their best ever result in their sport?
questions.rationale: Pippa ran her personal best time last month.

questions.prompt: Who wants to be selected for a higher-level team this year?
questions.rationale: Pippa's goal is to get selected for the regional athletics team this year.

questions.prompt: Who has been doing their sport since they were very young?
questions.rationale: Kofi has been playing tennis since he was seven years old.

questions.prompt: Who watches professionals to improve their own technique?
questions.rationale: Kofi watches professional tennis on TV to learn from the best players.

questions.prompt: Who trains very early in the morning?
questions.rationale: Dana's team trains at 6 a.m. before school.

questions.prompt: Who has already won medals at regional competitions?
questions.rationale: Dana has won two medals at regional level.

questions.prompt: Who relies on a parent to get to training sessions?
questions.rationale: Dana's parents drive her to the pool every training morning.

people.name: Bianca
people.text: I use technology a lot for school. I take notes on a tablet, use apps to manage my timetable and submit my homework online. I think it saves a lot of time. I am also good at fixing problems with computers and phones. My classmates often ask me for help when their devices stop working.

people.name: Omar
people.text: I enjoy coding. I started learning a year ago using free online tutorials. I have already built a simple game and a basic website. I want to create an app that helps students revise for exams. My school does not offer coding lessons so I am entirely self-taught. I spend about three hours a week practising.

people.name: Talia
people.text: I prefer to limit my use of technology. I do not have social media accounts and I only use my phone for calls and messages. I write in a paper diary and take notes by hand. My friends think I am unusual but I feel calmer and more focused this way. I spend my free time reading and being outdoors instead.

questions.prompt: Who uses digital tools to help organise their school life?
questions.rationale: Bianca uses apps to manage her timetable and submits homework online.

questions.prompt: Who helps other students solve problems with their devices?
questions.rationale: Bianca's classmates often ask her for help when their devices stop working.

questions.prompt: Who has taught themselves a technology skill without lessons at school?
questions.rationale: Omar's school does not offer coding and he is entirely self-taught.

questions.prompt: Who wants to create something to help students with their studies?
questions.rationale: Omar wants to create an app that helps students revise for exams.

questions.prompt: Who deliberately chooses not to use social media?
questions.rationale: Talia does not have social media accounts.

questions.prompt: Who says that using less technology makes them feel better?
questions.rationale: Talia says she feels calmer and more focused by limiting technology use.

questions.prompt: Who prefers to write things down on paper rather than using a device?
questions.rationale: Talia writes in a paper diary and takes notes by hand.

people.name: Greta
people.text: I love food from other countries. My favourite is Thai food because it is spicy and full of interesting flavours. I go to a Thai restaurant near my home with my family once a month. I also try to cook simple Asian dishes at home using recipes from the internet. I do not like fast food at all.

people.name: Andre
people.text: I am a vegetarian and I have been for three years. I decided not to eat meat because of animal welfare and the environment. I enjoy eating vegetables, beans, cheese and eggs. It can be difficult when I eat out because some restaurants do not have many vegetarian options. I feel healthy and I have a lot of energy.

people.name: Yuki
people.text: I have a very sweet tooth. I love desserts, cakes and chocolate. My favourite thing to do at weekends is visit bakeries and pastry shops with my friends. I know that eating too much sugar is not good for me and I try to have healthy meals during the week. I can never say no to a good piece of cake.

questions.prompt: Who visits a specific type of restaurant regularly with their family?
questions.rationale: Greta goes to a Thai restaurant with her family once a month.

questions.prompt: Who tries to cook food from a different culture at home?
questions.rationale: Greta tries to cook simple Asian dishes at home using internet recipes.

questions.prompt: Who made a food choice because of concerns about animals and the environment?
questions.rationale: Andre decided not to eat meat because of animal welfare and the environment.

questions.prompt: Who sometimes finds it hard to eat the way they want when they go out?
questions.rationale: Andre says some restaurants do not have many vegetarian options.

questions.prompt: Who visits food shops as a leisure activity with friends?
questions.rationale: Yuki visits bakeries and pastry shops with friends at weekends.

questions.prompt: Who tries to balance an unhealthy food habit with healthy eating?
questions.rationale: Yuki tries to have healthy meals during the week to balance her love of sweet things.

questions.prompt: Who says they never eat a particular type of food?
questions.rationale: Greta says she does not like fast food at all.

people.name: Femi
people.text: I am involved in local community activities. I am a member of the youth council for my town. We meet once a month to discuss ideas for improving the local area. Last year we got a new basketball court built in the park. I enjoy being part of decisions that affect my community. I want to study politics at university.

people.name: Harriet
people.text: I take part in local theatre productions. Our community theatre group meets every Wednesday evening and we put on two shows a year. I help with both acting and backstage work like costumes and lights. Tickets sell out quickly because many local people come to watch. It is a great way to meet people of all ages.

people.name: Sergio
people.text: I coach a junior football team in my neighbourhood. The children are between eight and ten years old. We train on Saturday mornings in the local park. I started doing this after my own football coach encouraged me. I enjoy seeing the children improve and have fun. Some parents have thanked me personally.

questions.prompt: Who takes part in meetings about how to improve the local area?
questions.rationale: Femi is on the youth council which meets to discuss improving the local area.

questions.prompt: Who helped make a positive change in their local community?
questions.rationale: Femi's youth council got a new basketball court built in the park.

questions.prompt: Who is involved in a community group that does public performances?
questions.rationale: Harriet's community theatre group puts on two shows a year.

questions.prompt: Who does more than one type of job in a group activity?
questions.rationale: Harriet helps with both acting and backstage work like costumes and lights.

questions.prompt: Who started a community role because someone inspired them?
questions.rationale: Sergio started coaching after his own football coach encouraged him.

questions.prompt: Who works with young children in their local area?
questions.rationale: Sergio coaches a junior football team of children aged eight to ten.

questions.prompt: Who has received personal thanks from people in the community?
questions.rationale: Some parents have thanked Sergio personally for coaching their children.

people.name: Clara
people.text: I enjoy reading very much. I like fantasy novels with magic and adventure. I read on my e-reader because I can carry many books at once. I belong to an online book club where members suggest and discuss books each month. I try to read one book a week. My goal is to read fifty books this year.

people.name: Piotr
people.text: I enjoy reading comics and graphic novels. I prefer them because the pictures help tell the story and they are quicker to read. I have a large collection of comics at home. I go to a comic book fair in my city once a year and I always spend a lot of money there. I want to draw my own comic one day.

people.name: Leah
people.text: I like reading non-fiction books, especially about history and true stories. I find facts more interesting than made-up stories. I always have a book in my bag in case I have free time. My school librarian recommends books to me and she knows exactly what I like. I have recommended books to three of my friends who have all enjoyed them.

questions.prompt: Who uses a digital device to read their books?
questions.rationale: Clara reads on her e-reader.

questions.prompt: Who is part of an online group where members discuss books?
questions.rationale: Clara belongs to an online book club.

questions.prompt: Who has a collection of reading material at home?
questions.rationale: Piotr has a large collection of comics at home.

questions.prompt: Who attends a special event connected to their reading interest?
questions.rationale: Piotr goes to a comic book fair in his city once a year.

questions.prompt: Who always carries reading material with them?
questions.rationale: Leah always has a book in her bag.

questions.prompt: Who gets reading recommendations from a school staff member?
questions.rationale: Leah's school librarian recommends books to her.

questions.prompt: Who wants to create their own reading material in the future?
questions.rationale: Piotr wants to draw his own comic one day.

people.name: Nat
people.text: I enjoy running. I go for a run in the park near my house three times a week after school. I use an app on my phone that tracks my distance and speed. I have taken part in two fun runs for charity and I raised money from my neighbours and family. I find running clears my mind when I am stressed.

people.name: Miriam
people.text: I do yoga and meditation every morning before school. I started because I was feeling anxious about exams. Now I feel much calmer and I sleep better at night. I follow videos online and do not go to a class. My younger sister has started doing yoga with me too. I think everyone should try it.

people.name: Dmitri
people.text: I play football every day. I am in the school team and we have a match most weekends. I also do push-ups and sit-ups at home to stay strong. My parents are both sporty and they encouraged me to be active from a young age. I eat carefully because I know nutrition affects my performance.

questions.prompt: Who uses technology to monitor their exercise?
questions.rationale: Nat uses an app to track distance and speed while running.

questions.prompt: Who has done sport to raise money for a good cause?
questions.rationale: Nat has taken part in two fun runs for charity.

questions.prompt: Who started an exercise routine to help with a mental health problem?
questions.rationale: Miriam started yoga because she was feeling anxious about exams.

questions.prompt: Who has introduced a family member to their form of exercise?
questions.rationale: Miriam's younger sister has started doing yoga with her.

questions.prompt: Who was encouraged to be active by their parents?
questions.rationale: Dmitri's parents encouraged him to be active from a young age.

questions.prompt: Who pays attention to their diet because of their sport?
questions.rationale: Dmitri eats carefully because he knows nutrition affects his performance.

questions.prompt: Who says exercise helps them feel less stressed?
questions.rationale: Nat says running clears his mind when he is stressed.

people.name: Elif
people.text: I love going to the cinema. I see a new film almost every weekend with my friends or my older brother. I prefer comedies and romantic films. I always have popcorn while I watch. I buy tickets online to save time. I have seen over a hundred films in the cinema. My favourite cinema has very comfortable seats and a huge screen.

people.name: Mo
people.text: I prefer watching films at home. I have a streaming subscription and I watch films on my laptop in bed. I enjoy thrillers and crime films. I often watch late at night which means I sometimes fall asleep. I like being able to stop and start the film whenever I want. I do not enjoy going out to crowded places.

people.name: Beatriz
people.text: I love going to music concerts and festivals. I have been to six concerts this year. My favourite band is playing in my city next month and I bought a ticket the day they went on sale. I also listen to new music every day using a streaming app. I enjoy discovering new artists that not many people know yet.

questions.prompt: Who goes to see films very regularly at the cinema?
questions.rationale: Elif goes to the cinema almost every weekend and has seen over a hundred films there.

questions.prompt: Who books entertainment tickets online in advance?
questions.rationale: Elif buys cinema tickets online to save time.

questions.prompt: Who prefers to watch films in a private, relaxed setting?
questions.rationale: Mo watches films at home on his laptop in bed.

questions.prompt: Who dislikes being in busy public places for entertainment?
questions.rationale: Mo says he does not enjoy going out to crowded places.

questions.prompt: Who bought a ticket very quickly for an upcoming event?
questions.rationale: Beatriz bought a concert ticket the day they went on sale.

questions.prompt: Who likes finding music by artists that are not yet well known?
questions.rationale: Beatriz enjoys discovering new artists that not many people know yet.

questions.prompt: Who likes a particular feature of their favourite place to watch entertainment?
questions.rationale: Elif says her favourite cinema has very comfortable seats and a huge screen.

people.name: Linh
people.text: I am very interested in fashion. I follow famous designers online and I read fashion magazines every month. I have my own style and I enjoy putting different clothes together in new ways. I sometimes sell clothes I no longer want at a school market. My friends often ask me for advice about what to wear.

people.name: Tobias
people.text: I do not think much about clothes. I usually wear the same few things and I buy new clothes only when I need them. I prefer to spend my money on technology and sports equipment. I find fashion confusing and I do not understand why people spend so much on clothes. Comfort is the most important thing for me.

people.name: Nkechi
people.text: I love wearing traditional clothes from my country on special occasions. My mum has taught me about the meanings of different colours and patterns. I also enjoy learning how to make clothes and I have joined a sewing class at the community centre. I am making a traditional outfit for my cousin's wedding.

questions.prompt: Who gives their friends advice about clothing?
questions.rationale: Linh's friends often ask her for advice about what to wear.

questions.prompt: Who earns money from selling clothes?
questions.rationale: Linh sells clothes she no longer wants at a school market.

questions.prompt: Who spends money on things other than clothes?
questions.rationale: Tobias prefers to spend his money on technology and sports equipment.

questions.prompt: Who says that being comfortable in clothes matters most to them?
questions.rationale: Tobias says comfort is the most important thing for him.

questions.prompt: Who is learning to make clothes in a class?
questions.rationale: Nkechi has joined a sewing class at the community centre.

questions.prompt: Who has learned about the cultural significance of clothing from a family member?
questions.rationale: Nkechi's mum has taught her about the meanings of colours and patterns.

questions.prompt: Who is making a piece of clothing for a family celebration?
questions.rationale: Nkechi is making a traditional outfit for her cousin's wedding.

people.name: Viktor
people.text: I think about my future career a lot. I want to be a doctor and I am working hard at school to get the grades I need. I have already done some work experience at a local clinic. I enjoy science and biology most. I know the training is very long but I am determined to do it.

people.name: Camille
people.text: I am not sure what career I want yet. I enjoy many different things and it is hard to choose. I have spoken to a careers adviser at school and she gave me some useful information. I am thinking about working in media, design or teaching. I plan to try different things before I decide.

people.name: Rafael
people.text: I want to start my own business one day. I have already sold handmade bracelets to friends and classmates for a small profit. I enjoy thinking about marketing and how to attract customers. My dad has his own business and he gives me advice. I am studying business and economics at school.

questions.prompt: Who has already gained some work experience in their chosen field?
questions.rationale: Viktor has done work experience at a local clinic.

questions.prompt: Who is studying subjects at school to help them reach their career goal?
questions.rationale: Viktor enjoys science and biology and is working hard for the grades he needs.

questions.prompt: Who has sought professional advice at school about their future?
questions.rationale: Camille has spoken to a careers adviser at school.

questions.prompt: Who has not yet made a decision about what career to follow?
questions.rationale: Camille is not sure what career she wants yet.

questions.prompt: Who has already earned money from a small business idea?
questions.rationale: Rafael has sold handmade bracelets for a small profit.

questions.prompt: Who gets career guidance from a parent?
questions.rationale: Rafael's dad has his own business and gives him advice.

questions.prompt: Who is determined to follow a career path even though it takes a long time?
questions.rationale: Viktor knows the medical training is very long but is determined to do it.
